Based in Nairobi, we serve Kenya and beyond.
Adventure calling…
Tuwai Adventures

Your sofa has heard one too many of your stories. What tale will you tell next? Isn't the world too beautiful to see only through a screen?

Worried about budget, or think adventure is too far away? Tired of gloomy sunsets by your window? Guess what — an experience seems so far yet so close. A Hakuna Matata experience awaits, closer than you think.

Weekend escape, staycation, safari, or coastal getaway — whatever's calling your name, let's write the next story of an experience together.

Our Collection

Tours & Safaris

Curated game drives, coastal escapes and cultural routes across Kenya — paced for first-timers and repeat travellers alike, with a local guide who knows the difference.

Non-Tour Adventures

Not every trip needs a passport. Open a category below.

Short Staycation

Weekend-length resets close to home — for residents who want the feeling of travel without the flight. Booked fast, priced for a regular weekend.

Hotel Bookings

Straightforward hotel reservations across Kenya — vetted properties, resident and visitor rates, and a booking sorted before you arrive.

City hotelsResort staysBest rate match
Team Building Packages

Offsites, retreats and structured activities built around your HR team's actual goals — not just a change of scenery, but a reason to trust each other more on Monday.

How booking works

Four steps, start to finish.

Free Consultation

Tell us what you're picturing — safari, offsite, staycation — and we'll talk through the options together.

Get a Curated Quote

We put together tailored options with clear pricing and payment plans to guide you on a variety of experiences that are available.

Book & Pay

Confirm the option that fits, pay, and lock your adventure.

Have the Experience

Enjoy every moment while we handle your processes and plan your upcoming adventure.

Word from the road

What travelling with us feels like.

Get in touch

Ready for your next Tuwai adventure?

Tell us what you're planning and we'll get back to you with a route, a price range, and next steps — usually within a day.

bookings@tuwaiadventure.com
